name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ Expense Tracker Bot

Track your spending in seconds.

• Tap /start to open the menu
• Tap 💵 Log Expense to add an expense
• Use 📊 Summary to see monthly totals vs budgets
• Set budgets with 🎯 Budget
• Manage categories with 📂 Categories
• /add — Quick log (amount + category in one message)
• /recent — View and edit recent expenses
• /summary — Monthly summary
• /setbudget — Set monthly budgets
• /export — Download your data as CSV

Everything is reachable by tapping — no commands to memorize.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
